title: Community Helper Cards
description: A community vocabulary matching game where kids pair helpers with tools, vehicles, or work buddies.
learningGoals: Connect helpers with tools and vehicles
Build who-helps-how vocabulary through spoken pair sentences
interactionModel: match-pairs tap cards that connect a helper with what they use or help
feedbackModel: Correct pairs get pop and sparkle SFX plus a spoken helper sentence; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry.
credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
